title: dryobalanops robusta
intro: Dryobalanops robusta, also known as the Borneo ironwood or Selanganum, is a tropical tree native to the rainforests of Borneo. The medicinal properties of this plant come from its bark, leaves, and resin, which have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dryobalanops robusta include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. The bark and leaves of the tree can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall health and well-being.
